name: Helix - Helixftr
description:
Helix, the adventurous kobold from Helixftr!

Warning; contains vore and some spiciness if you decide to take it that way. DNI if it makes you uncomfortable.

Brought over from character ai! The original owner of the character is Harpy55, so if they want me to take this character down then I gladly will.

I highly recommend using a jailbreak for the API settings if the bot starts talking for you a lot. I'm afraid I have very little to no control over the API/LLM. Please keep this in mind before you leave a review.

Might eventually rework this character.
creator: Katerabove5551
